The '''sky cannon''' was a massive weapon constructed within [[Mount Yeroc]] on [[Tahlboor]] by an ancient [[Tahlboorean]] civilization.<ref name="SWD:TPO">''[[The Protocol Offensive]]''</ref>

==Description==
It ran off the power of the [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] inner core and was made mobile by the use of many threaded wheels.<ref name="SWD:TPO" />

==History==
The Tahlbooreans hoped to use it to sculpt their world's surface and change the tides by altering their twin [[Moon/Legends|moons]]' orbits. It destroyed one moon and apparently caused the fall of their civilization.<ref name="SWD:TPO" />

Around [[6 BBY/Legends|5.5 BBY]], [[Jake Harthan]] tried to cause a genocidal war between the [[Troob]]s and [[Hobor]]s to give the [[Tion Hegemony/Legends|Tion Hegemony]] access to the weapon.<ref name="SWD:TPO" />

==Appearances==
*''[[The Protocol Offensive]]''
